human_verification.notes: Reviewed higher education compliance boundaries, onboarding-readiness and setup gating, FERPA/PPRA/study evidence sufficiency, dependency routing, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: All required scenario families for onboarding and education research are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for workflow phase and industry profile are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict higher education compliance specialist work to onboarding readiness, consent, permissions, dependency tracking, control mapping, and safe handoffs only.
Research sources include FERPA, PPRA, OHRP/Common Rule, FSA, IPEDS, accreditation, and grant-related obligations relevant to higher education and research compliance operations.
Scenario set covers consent gaps, go-live gates, authority transitions, and prohibited grading/instruction decisions.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for trusted built transitions.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; all interpretation uncertainty is surfaced as explicit escalation or orchestrator-return conditions.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
